title: ProDec Advance 4" Titan Heavy Duty Scraper with Double Thickness Hardened Steel Blades, Rugged Chrome Shaft with Soft Grip Handle, Delivers Maximum Scraping Power
features: Heavy duty scraper to power through even the toughest jobs
Rugged chrome shaft with soft grip handle for maximum comfort
Quick release mechanism enables blade changes in seconds with no tools required
MORE INFORMATION BELOW in the 'From The Manufacturer' section - click on 'See More Product Details' or scroll down
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint Titan - scraping doesn't get any more heavy duty than this Loaded for power and performance, Titan puts heavy duty scraping at your fingertips. 4" double thickness blade Designed to withstand serious punishment for heavy duty scraping, the Titan blade is double the thickness of standard scraper blades, so it won't let you down on the toughest jobs. Rugged chrome shaft Titan is all about brute force and the chrome plated shaft is 19mm (3/4") in diameter, enabling you to deliver massive power to the blade. Soft grip handle Designed to give improved purchase and more comfortable working especially during heavy duty use, the handle has a durable rubber grip. Quick blade change The butterfly clamp has a simple flip up, flip down mechanism to securely clamp the blade in place for minimum downtime in the middle of a job. Wield the ultimate scraping power Designed for heavy duty scraping, the 4" Titan Scraper features blades made from double thickness steel designed to withstand serious punishment, held in a cast steel head and mounted onto a rugged 19mm (3/4") diameter chrome steel shaft with a soft grip handle for comfort and reduced hand fatigue. This rugged construction enables you get through tough tasks including: Removing wall and floor tile grout, adhesives/glues, silicones, sealants and bitumen Stripping wallpaper including anaglypta/woodchip papers Scraping wood, metal and plaster surfaces Lifting vinyl flooring General building work and much more Changing blades is done quickly and easily in seconds via the quick release butterfly mechanism: simply flip up to release your blade and then back down to clamp the new one securely in place - no tools are required. Replacement blade packs are available to purchase separately.
